If this PR changes any public API, add a changeset before merging:

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm build` and `pnpm test` locally
- [ ] I updated the affected package's README if the public API changed
- [ ] I added or updated Storybook stories for visual changes
- [ ] I followed the existing code style (`pnpm lint` / `pnpm format` clean)
